programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: With the contestants narrowed down to 32, Don Mann and Randy Couture reveal a new twist that changes the game: a complex point system that turns survival into a strategic battle. Contestants face grueling military training and a brutal 5K run through Nevada’s desert, testing their endurance and mental toughness. As mentors and adversaries, Don and Randy push the contestants to their limits. This episode marks the beginning of an intense journey where only the strongest and most strategic will prevail.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The night mission is a go.. or so they thought. As the team readied for the night mission, word from HQ derails the plan. The team has to act fast to adapt to an ever-changing hostage situation. With an ingenious plan formed, some contestants have to go undercover to get the intel needed to complete the mission. See who this season's winner is on the nail-biter season finale of Surviving Mann.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: With the mission imminent, Chris and Cindy sit down with Danny and Kyle for some last words on how the competition has been going so far. With Kyle still nursing a brutal hamstring pull, he gives us some insight on his unique running method. Cindy also chats with Autumn from Stream2Sea about her revolutionary product the team used today to beat the Florida sun.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The best of the best are back to compete, and Don’s serving up a heaping plate of his signature 10-part PRT. A bear crawl down a mountain, log running and two-point planks are just some of Don’s welcome gauntlet. And the cherry on top—a 5k desert run. But the contestants only have themselves to blame. Because when you’re already amongst the elite, you have to do whatever it takes to find the one who stands above the rest.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The CIA has called again, and Don has answered the call on behalf of the A-team. A team of special operatives are needed for a highly classified peace mission that could turn deadly at a moment's notice. To spearhead their mission training efforts, the team hits the range with some state-of-the-art SIRT pistols. Then, the gloves are off and the team gets their first course of fire for the season. After the fun course of fire, the team switches gears to knife throwing and fire building, with the help of Top Knives. It’s safe to say, these All-stars aren’t waiting a second.

programme.title: Winter's Grace, Sierra Mountains
programme.desc: Experience the awe inspiring beauty of winter in "Winter's Grace, Sierra Mountains". A tranquil soundtrack accompanies the awe inspiring scenery at "the top of Europe".

programme.title: S2E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike brings you the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch Sam Reynolds, street shredder, Clemens Kaudela, slopestyle champion, Theo Erlangsen, trail innovator, and Vincent Tupin, downhill powerhouse, in an exhilarating GoPro Course Preview in South Africa. Then head to Zion, Utah for Red Bull Rampage with Jaxson Riddle, big-air phenom, Reed Boggs, freeride master, Thomas Genon, slopestyle superstar, and Tom Van Steenbergen, trail blazing pro, as they push the limits of skill and courage on some of the planet’s most extreme terrain.

programme.title: S2E2 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on epic rides around the world. Watch Olympic gold medalist Conor Fields, BMX champion, compete at the highest level, then join GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, Geoff Gulevich, trail expert, and Sam Reynolds, street shredder, as they explore the stunning landscapes and dramatic terrain of Cappadocia, Turkey. Adventure, speed, and skill collide in every breathtaking moment.

programme.title: S1E1 Animals
programme.desc: GoPro Animals delivers heartwarming, hilarious, and jaw-dropping moments from the animal world. From Golden Retrievers, French Bulldogs, and Border Collies bringing endless puppy smiles, to rescuing orcas and swimming with humpback whales, this show has it all. Wildlife photographer Chris Barnard captures the wild up close, even surviving a giraffe’s mighty kick. Plus, join Ocean Conservation Namibia as they race to save seals trapped in deadly ocean debris. A must-watch for every animal lover.

programme.title: Son of the Renegade, 1942
programme.desc: The son of a notorious outlaw grows up unaware of his father’s criminal past. As he comes of age, he is drawn into a conflict between lawmen and outlaws, forcing him to confront the truth about his heritage. Struggling between loyalty and justice, he must decide whether to follow in his father’s footsteps or forge his own path on the side of the law.

programme.title: High Lonesome 1950, John Drew Barrymore

programme.title: Gunman from Bodie

programme.title: The Outlaw (1943) Colorized
programme.desc: Howard Hughes’ infamous Western The Outlaw blazes with passion, rivalry, and danger. When Billy the Kid (Jack Buetel) rides into town, he becomes entangled in a volatile triangle with gunslinger Doc Holliday (Walter Huston) and lawman Pat Garrett (Thomas Mitchell). But it’s the fiery beauty Rio (Jane Russell, in her breakout role) who sparks the most dangerous conflict of all. With smoldering romance, tense standoffs, and Hughes’ bold style, this legendary film pushed boundaries and made Hollywood history.

programme.title: North of Arizona
